title: Nebula for Bravery

The '''Nebula for Bravery''' was a military decoration awarded to [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] staff and [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Special Forces]] members. The award was given twice to [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]],<ref name="CRFG" /> and one was waiting to be presented to an agent known at the time only as [[Jan Ors|Jan Strange]] (later known to be [[Jan Ors]]), who infiltrated [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] to engage in counter-intelligence, sabotage, and covert extraction.<ref name="CRO" />
